name: CIS Amazon Web Services Foundations Benchmark

controls.title: Storage — Simple Storage Service (S3): public access blocked, encryption at rest
Storage — Elastic Compute Cloud (EC2): EBS volume encryption
Logging: access and audit logging enabled
Networking: no unrestricted ingress to administrative ports

notAssessable.title: Identity and Access Management
notAssessable.reason: IAM posture (root account, MFA, key rotation) is live-account state; IaC files alone cannot attest to it.

notAssessable.title: Monitoring
notAssessable.reason: Metric filters and alarms are assessed against the live CloudWatch configuration, not templates.
